name: SYS · Session Duration by User & Day
sql:
WITH user_activity AS (
    SELECT 
        jsonb_extract_path_text(value::jsonb, 'username') AS username,
        date_created,
        type,
        value
    FROM events
    WHERE type IN ('USER_LOGIN', 'PAGE_VIEW')
),
session_start_end AS (
    SELECT 
        username,
        DATE(date_created) AS session_date,
        date_created AS session_start,
        LEAD(date_created) OVER (
            PARTITION BY username, DATE(date_created)
            ORDER BY date_created
        ) AS session_end,
        value
    FROM user_activity
    WHERE type = 'USER_LOGIN'
)
SELECT 
    s.session_date,
    s.username,
    s.session_start AS login_time,
    MAX(pv.date_created) AS last_page_viewed_time,
    FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(s.session_end, MAX(pv.date_created)) - s.session_start)) / 60) AS total_session_minutes
FROM session_start_end s
JOIN user_activity pv
    ON s.username = pv.username
    AND DATE(s.session_start) = DATE(pv.date_created)
    AND pv.date_created > s.session_start
    AND pv.type = 'PAGE_VIEW' -- Only consider PAGE_VIEW events after login
GROUP BY s.session_date, s.username, s.session_start, s.session_end
ORDER BY s.session_date, s.username, s.session_start
